---
title: Example 10—Readable and Writable External Tables with XML Transformations

---

WarehousePG can read and write XML data to and from external tables with gpfdist. For information about setting up an XML transform, see [Transforming External Data with gpfdist and gpload](../../../load/transforming-xml-data.md).

**Parent topic:** [Examples for Creating External Tables](index.md)
